title: Business Promoter(BP).
html:
[caption id="attachment_6897" align="alignnone" width="300"] JOB VACANCY CALL[/caption]
  1. GENERAL INFORMATION
  • Solicitation Number: G3B/HR/001/05/2026
  • Issuance Date: 06/05/2026
  • Closing Date/Time: 19/05/2026
  • Point of Contact: info@g3-bizltd.com
  • Position Title/Number Needed: Business Promoter (04)
  • Duty Station: Limbe, South West Region, Cameroon
  • Job Type: Full Time
  • Reporting Line: Sales Supervisor
  1. STATEMENT OF DUTY
Global Strategic Business Limited (G3-Biz Ltd) is a dynamic beverage distribution company committed to disciplined market expansion, responsible commercial execution, and ethical business practices. We are seeking a results-driven and ethically grounded Business Promoter who will drive market growth while upholding the company’s values of integrity, accountability, professionalism, and teamwork.
  1. ROLE PURPOSE
To support territory growth, increase product visibility, activate new outlets, strengthen customer relationships, and protect company assets while demonstrating discipline, honesty, and operational excellence.
  1. KEY RESPONSIBILITIES
  2. Market Development & Sales Execution
  • Execute approved journey plans with full territory coverage.
  • Support achievement of assigned sales volume and distribution targets.
  • Activate new outlets and increase SKU penetration.
  • Provide timely market and competitor intelligence.
  • Maximize sales opportunities during assigned events.
  1. Customer Relationship & Brand Representation
  • Build trust-based and respectful customer relationships.
  • Ensure proper display and visibility of company products.
  • Represent G3-Biz professionally at all times.
  • Resolve and escalate customer concerns promptly.
  1. Asset & Operational Discipline
  • Safeguard company promotional materials and field tools.
  • Maintain accurate daily reporting and documentation.
  • Respect assigned territory boundaries strictly.
  • Participate fully in end-of-day operational processes as required.
  1. Mobility & Driving Responsibilities
  • Possess and maintain a valid driver’s license.
  • Safely operate company or assigned vehicles in line with company policy.
  • Ensure proper handling and basic care of assigned vehicle/motorbike.
  • Comply with all road safety and traffic regulations.
  • Promptly report any incidents, damages, or mechanical issues.
  1. PERSONAL ETHICS & BEHAVIOURAL EXPECTATIONS
We are recruiting not just skill, but character. The ideal candidate must:
  • Demonstrate zero tolerance for fraud or misconduct.
  • Show honesty in all financial and field transactions.
  • Be accountable without constant supervision.
   
  • Maintain discipline under pressure.
  • Work collaboratively and respectfully within teams.
  • Uphold and protect the G3-Biz brand image at all times.
  1. MINIMUM QUALIFICATIONS
Education: Advanced Level (A-Level) or equivalent qualification. Experience: 1–2 years’ experience in sales promotion, distribution, or Fast Moving Consumer Goods (FMCG) marketing is an advantage. Skills Required:
  • Strong communication and persuasion ability
  • Basic numerical and reporting competence
  • Physical readiness for field operations
  • High ethical standards and professional conduct
  1. PERFORMANCE EXPECTATIONS
The Business Promoter will be evaluated based on:
  • Territory coverage compliance
  • Outlet activation and market expansion
  • Contribution to sales growth
  • Event performance execution
  • Asset protection and documentation accuracy
  • Professional discipline and teamwork
  1. EVALUATION & SELECTION FACTORS
  • Relevant Experience – 30%
  • Job Knowledge & Sales Understanding – 40%
  • Behavioural Competence & Integrity – 30%
  1. APPLICATION PROCEDURE
Interested candidates should submit: a cover letter, CV, copy of National ID, and relevant Certificates Subject of email:BUSINESS PROMOTER – G3-BIZ LTD Send to:info@g3-bizltd.com Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.   NB: Due to the urgency of the position, G3-Biz has the right to recruit a candidate who matches the required profile before the above deadline.   The HOD HR/Admin G3-Biz Ltd Cameroon
text:
JOB VACANCY CALL

 GENERAL INFORMATION



 Solicitation Number: G3B/HR/001/05/2026

 Issuance Date: 06/05/2026

 Closing Date/Time: 19/05/2026

 Point of Contact: info@g3-bizltd.com

 Position Title/Number Needed: Business Promoter (04)

 Duty Station: Limbe, South West Region, Cameroon

 Job Type: Full Time

 Reporting Line: Sales Supervisor



 STATEMENT OF DUTY


Global Strategic Business Limited (G3-Biz Ltd) is a dynamic beverage distribution company committed to disciplined market expansion, responsible commercial execution, and ethical business practices.

We are seeking a results-driven and ethically grounded Business Promoter who will drive market growth while upholding the company’s values of integrity, accountability, professionalism, and teamwork.

 ROLE PURPOSE


To support territory growth, increase product visibility, activate new outlets, strengthen customer relationships, and protect company assets while demonstrating discipline, honesty, and operational excellence.

 KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

 Market Development & Sales Execution



 Execute approved journey plans with full territory coverage.

 Support achievement of assigned sales volume and distribution targets.

 Activate new outlets and increase SKU penetration.

 Provide timely market and competitor intelligence.

 Maximize sales opportunities during assigned events.



 Customer Relationship & Brand Representation



 Build trust-based and respectful customer relationships.

 Ensure proper display and visibility of company products.

 Represent G3-Biz professionally at all times.

 Resolve and escalate customer concerns promptly.



 Asset & Operational Discipline



 Safeguard company promotional materials and field tools.

 Maintain accurate daily reporting and documentation.

 Respect assigned territory boundaries strictly.

 Participate fully in end-of-day operational processes as required.



 Mobility & Driving Responsibilities



 Possess and maintain a valid driver’s license.

 Safely operate company or assigned vehicles in line with company policy.

 Ensure proper handling and basic care of assigned vehicle/motorbike.

 Comply with all road safety and traffic regulations.

 Promptly report any incidents, damages, or mechanical issues.



 PERSONAL ETHICS & BEHAVIOURAL EXPECTATIONS


We are recruiting not just skill, but character.

The ideal candidate must:

 Demonstrate zero tolerance for fraud or misconduct.

 Show honesty in all financial and field transactions.

 Be accountable without constant supervision.


 

 

 Maintain discipline under pressure.

 Work collaboratively and respectfully within teams.

 Uphold and protect the G3-Biz brand image at all times.



 MINIMUM QUALIFICATIONS


Education:
Advanced Level (A-Level) or equivalent qualification.

Experience:
1–2 years’ experience in sales promotion, distribution, or Fast Moving Consumer Goods (FMCG) marketing is an advantage.

Skills Required:

 Strong communication and persuasion ability

 Basic numerical and reporting competence

 Physical readiness for field operations

 High ethical standards and professional conduct



 PERFORMANCE EXPECTATIONS


The Business Promoter will be evaluated based on:

 Territory coverage compliance

 Outlet activation and market expansion

 Contribution to sales growth

 Event performance execution

 Asset protection and documentation accuracy

 Professional discipline and teamwork



 EVALUATION & SELECTION FACTORS



 Relevant Experience – 30%

 Job Knowledge & Sales Understanding – 40%

 Behavioural Competence & Integrity – 30%



 APPLICATION PROCEDURE


Interested candidates should submit: a cover letter, CV, copy of National ID, and relevant Certificates

Subject of email:BUSINESS PROMOTER – G3-BIZ LTD

Send to:info@g3-bizltd.com

Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

 

NB: Due to the urgency of the position, G3-Biz has the right to recruit a candidate who matches the required profile before the above deadline.

 

The HOD HR/Admin

G3-Biz Ltd Cameroon
